title: Date queries: tk list --overdue/--due-before + sort
description:
Add date filters and sort to tk list, backed by the T3 slip signal and the target_date field. Design §9 surface.

Files: cmd/tk/cmd/list.go, internal/query/filter.go.
acceptance_criteria: tk list --overdue and --due-before <date> filter correctly; --sort target_date orders by date; query/filter tests pass
closed_reason: Completed: tk list --overdue (via Slip), --due-before, --sort target_date; composes with existing filters
